senses.definition: on the subject of somebody/something; in connection with somebody/something

examples.en: a book about flowers
examples.cn: 一本关于花卉的书

examples.en: Tell me all about it.
examples.cn: 把情况全部告诉我。

examples.en: What's she so angry about?
examples.cn: 她为什么生这么大的气？

examples.en: There's something strange about him.
examples.cn: 他有点怪。

examples.en: There's something about this business that is not quite right.
examples.cn: 这个行业有些地方不太对劲。

examples.en: I don't know what you're on about (= talking about).
examples.cn: 我不懂你在谈什么。

examples.en: There's nothing you can do about it now.
examples.cn: 现在你对此毫无办法。

langbank.title: Saying what a text is about

examples.en: The book is about homeless people in the cities.
examples.cn: 这本书写的是城市中无家可归的人们。

examples.en: The report deals with the issue of homelessness in London.
examples.cn: 这篇报道是关于伦敦的无家可归问题。

examples.en: The writer discusses the problems faced by homeless people.
examples.cn: 作者讨论了无家可归者面临的种种问题。

examples.en: The article presents an overview of the issues surrounding homelessness.
examples.cn: 这篇文章概述了有关无家可归的种种问题。

examples.en: The novel explores the theme of friendship among homeless people.
examples.cn: 这部小说探究了无家可归者之间的友谊这个主题。

examples.en: The first chapter examines the relationship between homelessness and drug addiction.
examples.cn: 第一章考察了无家可归与吸毒成瘾之间的关系。

examples.en: The paper considers the question of why so many young people become homeless.
examples.cn: 这篇论文论述了为何如此多的年轻人变得无家可归的问题。

senses.definition: used to describe the purpose or an aspect of something

examples.en: Movies are all about making money these days.
examples.cn: 当今电影只顾赚钱。

examples.en: What was all that about? (= what was the reason for what has just happened?)
examples.cn: 这到底是怎么回事？

senses.definition: busy with something; doing something

examples.en: Everywhere people were going about their daily business.
examples.cn: 无论哪里，人们都在忙着干日常工作。

examples.en: And while you’re about it… (= while you’re doing that)
examples.cn: 在你干这件事的同时，顺便…

senses.definition: in many directions in a place; here and there

examples.en: We wandered about the town for an hour or so.
examples.cn: 我们在城里到处游逛了一个小时左右。

examples.en: He looked about the room.
examples.cn: 他在房间里四下看了看。

senses.definition: in various parts of a place; here and there

examples.en: The papers were strewn about the room.
examples.cn: 房间里四处乱扔着文件。

senses.definition: next to a place or person; in the area mentioned

examples.en: She's somewhere about the office.
examples.cn: 她在办公室附近。

senses.definition: surrounding somebody/something

examples.en: She wore a shawl about her shoulders.
examples.cn: 她披了一件披肩。

senses.definition: used when asking for information about somebody/something

examples.en: How about Ruth? Have you heard from her?
examples.cn: 露丝怎么样了？你有她的消息吗？

examples.en: I'm having fish. What about you?
examples.cn: 我吃鱼，你呢？

senses.definition: used to make a suggestion

examples.en: How about going for a walk?
examples.cn: 去散散步怎么样？

examples.en: How about we go for a walk?
examples.cn: 我们去散散步怎么样？

examples.en: What about a break?
examples.cn: 休息一下如何？

senses.definition: a little more or less than; a little before or after

examples.en: It costs about $10.
examples.cn: 这大约要花 10 美元。

examples.en: They waited (for) about an hour.
examples.cn: 他们等了一小时左右。

examples.en: He arrived (at) about ten.
examples.cn: 他是十点钟左右到的。

senses.definition: nearly; very close to

examples.en: I'm just about ready.
examples.cn: 我就要准备好了。

examples.en: This is about the best we can hope for.
examples.cn: 这差不多是我们所能希望的最好结果。

senses.definition: in many directions; here and there

examples.en: The children were rushing about in the garden.
examples.cn: 孩子们在花园里跑来跑去。

senses.definition: in no particular order; in various places

examples.en: Her books were lying about on the floor.
examples.cn: 她的书在地板上东一本西一本地放着。

senses.definition: doing nothing in particular

examples.en: People were standing about in the road.
examples.cn: 人们在路上闲站着。

senses.definition: able to be found in a place

examples.en: There was nobody about.
examples.cn: 附近没有人。

examples.en: There's a lot of flu about.
examples.cn: 这一带流感肆虐。

examples.en: She’s somewhere about—I saw her a few minutes ago.
examples.cn: 她在附近——几分钟前我见过她。

senses.definition: facing the opposite direction

examples.en: He brought the ship about.
examples.cn: 他掉转船头。

senses.definition: almost; very nearly

examples.en: I've met just about everyone.
examples.cn: 我几乎每个人都见到了。

examples.en: ‘Did you reach your sales target?’ ‘Just about.’
examples.cn: “你的销售目标达到了吗？”“差不多了。”

senses.definition: approximately

examples.en: She should be arriving just about now.
examples.cn: 她现在该到了。

senses.definition: able to go outside again after an illness
travelling around a place

examples.en: We've been out and about talking to people all over the country.
examples.cn: 我们游遍了全国，和各地的人交谈。

idioms.phrase: that’s about all | that’s about it

senses.definition: used to say that you have finished telling somebody about something and there is nothing to add
senses.definition_cn: 我要说的就是这些；我的话完了

examples.en: ‘Anything else?’ ‘No, that's about it for now.’
examples.cn: “还有什么要说的吗？”“没有了，现在我要说的就是这些。”

senses.definition: to be close to doing something; to be going to do something very soon

examples.en: I was just about to ask you the same thing.
examples.cn: 我刚才正要问你同一件事情。

senses.definition: to be close to doing something; to be going to do something very soon

examples.en: I was just about to ask you the same thing.
examples.cn: 我刚才正要问你同一件事情。

idioms.phrase: be not about to do something

senses.definition: to not be willing to do something; to not intend to do something

examples.en: I've never done any cooking and I'm not about to start now.
examples.cn: 我从来没有做过饭，也不想从现在开始做起来。
